text.title: Mutation Testing as the Agent Feedback Signal Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team keeps both coverage gate AND mutation gate. Coverage passes; mutation buried in advisory output; nobody reads it.
antipattern.fix: Decommission line-coverage as a merge gate; mutation is the sole quality signal.

antipattern.symptom: Every PR sees 400 mutation diffs in the comment. Reviewers ignore them.
antipattern.fix: Switch to diff scope; weekly full-codebase report goes to a dashboard, not a PR comment.

antipattern.symptom: 20% of mutants tagged equivalent with no justification. Score artificially inflated.
antipattern.fix: Require a written justification + reviewer sign-off; periodically re-audit existing equivalence tags.
